text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Summer camp may be over now, but my spirit is
burning hotter than ever before.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I know I've gained a lot of strength for the
autumn Tenno Sho.
choice_data_list: All that's left is the main event!
All that's left is the main event!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Yes. If I can maintain my current form, I'm
confident I'll win.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
After we return to the academy, I will maintain my
focus and continue to train hard!
